metadata.description: Internal team plugins for Cursor IDE

plugins.name: continuous-documentation
plugins.description: Keeps repository README.md current by documenting each commit — pairing the diff with the reasoning from the live conversation.

plugins.name: email-agent-learning
plugins.description: Mines agent transcripts to build a local EMAIL-AGENT.md knowledge file covering email infrastructure, projects, tools, workflows, and decisions. All learnings stay workspace-local.

plugins.name: backend-chapter
plugins.description: Backend Chapter plugin: .NET skill suite, Jira workflows, MCP servers (Cursor).
